allow: Bash(node -e "const glyphMap = require\('@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/glyphmaps/MaterialIcons.json'\); const matches = Object.keys\(glyphMap\).filter\(k => k.includes\('home'\)\); console.log\(matches.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const glyphMap = require\('@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/glyphmaps/MaterialCommunityIcons.json'\); const matches = Object.keys\(glyphMap\).filter\(k => k.includes\('home-outline'\)\); console.log\(matches.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const glyphMap = require\('@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/glyphmaps/MaterialCommunityIcons.json'\); const matches = Object.keys\(glyphMap\).filter\(k => k.includes\('cog-outline'\)\); console.log\(matches.join\('\\n'\)\);")
